message:
fix(h2): reject PUSH_PROMISE frames with promised stream ID 0 per RFC 7540 section 6.6

RFC 7540 requires that the promised stream identifier in a PUSH_PROMISE frame
be a valid stream ID. Stream ID 0 is reserved for the connection control stream
and must never appear as a promised stream. Previously, we accepted stream ID 0
without error, which could cause downstream confusion in stream management
(e.g., accidentally aliasing the control stream).

Adds an explicit check in PushPromiseFrame::parse that returns a ProtocolError
when the promised stream ID is 0, along with a targeted regression test that
verifies the error code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
